tools.name: search_clinics
tools.description: Find veterinary specialty clinics by city + specialty. Returns a ranked shortlist with credentials, address, rating, review count, and a contact action. Promoted listings rank first.

tools.name: get_clinic
tools.description: Fetch a single clinic's full record by slug: credentials, inline reviews, procedures performed, contact action, canonical URL.

tools.name: get_procedure
tools.description: Fetch a procedure article with cost band, contraindications, emergency signals, FAQ, citations. When state is supplied, also returns a ranked clinic finder pre-filtered to that state.

tools.name: list_specialties
tools.description: Closed-set enum of recognized veterinary specialty slugs. Returns slug, display_name, and credentialing_board.sameAs (when applicable). Always call this before search_clinics if uncertain about specialty mapping.

tools.name: list_procedures
tools.description: Published procedure catalog. Returns slug, display_name, also_known_as, specialty_slug for every procedure with a live article.

tools.name: find_specialists_by_procedure
tools.description: Convenience: combines get_procedure + state filter. Returns the ranked specialist finder list for a procedure in a given state.

tools.name: estimate_procedure_cost
tools.description: Anonymous cost estimate. Returns $low–$high range computed from regional + case factors. Deterministic on identical inputs. PII fields are rejected — use quote_for_case for the PII path.

tools.name: quote_for_case
tools.description: Composite tool. Always computes an estimate. When owner_email is also present, additionally submits a confirmation-gated lead and dispatches a confirmation email to the owner (requires X-Agent-Attribution header). When PII is absent, behaves identically to estimate_procedure_cost and returns status=

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "search_clinics" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Find veterinary specialty clinics by city + specialty. Returns a ranked shortlist with credentials, address, rating, review count, and a contact action. Promote…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_clinic" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Fetch a single clinic's full record by slug: credentials, inline reviews, procedures performed, contact action, canonical URL.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_clinics, get_clinic · Private data: search_clinics, get_clinic · Public sink: quote_for_case.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_clinics, get_clinic · Private data: search_clinics, get_clinic · Public sink: quote_for_case

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
